target.title: Add stdout diagnostics OTEL log exporter
target.body:
## Summary
- Add `diagnostics.otel.logsExporter` with `otlp`, `stdout`, and `both` modes while keeping the default as OTLP.
- Route stdout JSONL through the same diagnostics-otel log-record build path as OTLP, including redaction, content-capture rules, attribute filtering, security events, and trusted trace fields.
- Add a QA Lab stdout-log smoke scenario and make the smoke wrapper fail when stdout mode captures zero gateway stdout records.

## What Changed
- `extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.ts` now builds each diagnostic log record once and sends it to the selected sink: OTLP, stdout JSONL, or both.
- `src/config/*` and generated config docs now expose `diagnostics.otel.logsExporter`.
- `test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/qa-otel-smoke-runtime.ts` can run stdout-log E2E proof with `--logs-exporter stdout`, asserts OTLP logs stay off, and parses sanitized gateway stdout artifacts for real stdout JSONL records.
- `qa/scenarios/runtime/otel-stdout-log-smoke.yaml` preserves sanitized gateway debug logs so the wrapper can verify emitted stdout records after a successful QA run.

## Proof
| Evidence | Claim Proved | How To Check |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `node --import tsx test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/qa-otel-smoke-runtime.ts --scenario otel-stdout-log-smoke --logs-exporter stdout --output-dir .artifacts/test-audit-otel-stdout-after-artifact-fix` | Real QA Lab gateway run emits stdout diagnostics logs while traces and metrics still reach OTLP and OTLP logs stay off. | Passed with `spans=17`, `metrics=24`, `stdoutLogs=16`, `traces=3`, `metricRequests=5`, `logRequests=0`. |
| Focused diagnostics/config/QA Vitest run | Unit coverage protects stdout-only, OTLP-only, both-sink behavior, security-event stdout export, config parsing, generated schema, and smoke-runner assertions. | Passed 5 Vitest shards: 23 + 90 + 23 + 94 + 46 tests. |
| Config/doc generated checks | Generated config baseline and docs references match the new config field. | `generate-base-config-schema --check`, `generate-config-doc-baseline --check`, `docs:check-mdx`, and docs formatting all passed. |

## Verification
```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/qa-otel-smoke.e2e.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-planning.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.test.ts src/config/config-misc.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts
node --import tsx test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/qa-otel-smoke-runtime.ts --scenario otel-stdout-log-smoke --logs-exporter stdout --output-dir .artifacts/test-audit-otel-stdout-after-artifact-fix
node --import tsx scripts/generate-base-config-schema.ts --check
node --import tsx scripts/generate-config-doc-baseline.ts --check
pnpm docs:list
pnpm docs:check-mdx
pnpm format:docs:check
node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo
node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions.tsbuildinfo
node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo
node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo
node scripts/check-src-extension-import-boundary.mjs
node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.ts extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-planning.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-planning.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-test-helpers.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite.ts src/config/config-misc.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/schema.labels.ts src/config/types.base.ts src/config/zod-schema.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/qa-otel-smoke-runtime.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/qa-otel-smoke.e2e.test.ts
pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.ts extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/scenario-catalog.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-planning.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-planning.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-test-helpers.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite.ts src/config/config-misc.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/schema.labels.ts src/config/types.base.ts src/config/zod-schema.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/qa-otel-smoke-runtime.ts test/e2e/qa-lab/runtime/qa-otel-smoke.e2e.test.ts extensions/diagnostics-otel/package.json extensions/diagnostics-otel/openclaw.plugin.json extensions/diagnostics-otel/npm-shrinkwrap.json qa/scenarios/runtime/otel-stdout-log-smoke.yaml
npm_config_registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ NPM_CONFIG_REGISTRY=https://registry.npmjs.org/ node scripts/generate-npm-shrinkwrap.mjs --changed --check
git diff --check
```
